results.description: Both generated workflow files parse as valid JSON
Workflows have the required names
Both workflows are inactive
No node in either workflow has a credentials object
Neither workflow JSON contains secret-like literal values
No httpRequest node targets a live Instantly endpoint unless gated by a credentialPlaceholder live-path adapter
api.instantly.ai appears only inside Code node source as a documented (non-executed) string literal, or in a gated credentialPlaceholder live-path adapter node
Error handler workflow never calls Slack/email/Sheets
Sender workflow hardcodes OPERATING_MODE=VALIDATION, DRY_RUN=true, LIVE_CAMPAIGNS=[], LIVE_CREDENTIAL_READY=false
Every generated Code node compiles as standalone n8n JavaScript
Generated Error Handler Code nodes execute a synthetic SEND_UNCERTAIN pipeline
Generated Sender Code nodes execute the validation DRY_RUN path
computeSendKey() and the sidecar deriveSendKey() ignore the random body marker
Concurrent second acquisition for the same identity is blocked (LOCK_ALREADY_HELD)
Sidecar durable state stores hashes instead of raw sender/recipient identifiers
A later sequential rerun for the same identity is blocked (DURABLE_STATE_EXISTS)
No transition is allowed from SEND_UNCERTAIN back to SUBMITTING
DRY_RUN gate passes and the DRY_RUN terminal never sets transport other than NONE
A missing approval blocks the send gates
LIVE_CAMPAIGNS=[] always blocks live campaign sends
An unresolved [[token]] in draft_text blocks the draft variable gate
An invalid Decision Engine output fails validateSenderInput and the gate router
A blocked acquisition produces a single BLOCKED terminal with no further action
Unsubscribe confirmation is only permitted once both suppression actions are verified
A partial suppression failure escalates instead of confirming unsubscribe
HTTP 400 classifies as terminal PERMANENT_FAILURE
HTTP 401/402/403 classify as terminal AUTH_OR_PLAN_FAILURE
HTTP 404 classifies as terminal INVALID_REPLY_TARGET
HTTP 429 with Retry-After is retryable and honours Retry-After (capped)
HTTP 500/502/503/504 classify as retryable
A malformed 2xx body and a timeout both classify as SEND_UNCERTAIN
A well-formed 2xx body (status=sent, messageId) classifies as terminal SENT
SEND_UNCERTAIN is terminal: no further POST is attempted even if outcomes remain
Zero matches reconciles to HUMAN_REVIEW_ZERO_MATCHES
Multiple matches in a single poll reconciles to HUMAN_REVIEW_MULTIPLE_MATCHES
The same single match on two consecutive polls reconciles to SENT_RECONCILED
Error records are normalised, classified, and have secrets/long values redacted
SEND_UNCERTAIN error records are never marked retryable, regardless of http_status
The error handler produces only a placeholder notification
attachErrorId() merges the sidecar errorId onto the item, and writeErrorRecord round-trips
docker-compose.yml does not publish a host port for hmz-send-state
hmz_send_state_data is declared as a named volume
